creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->scheidell

Let me take this now.  all the *thrift* ports have been updated to 0.8.0 
I will add the new ../thrift/bsd.thrift.mk file so these will be in sync, 
and submit a new proposed patch for maintainer to look at.
